name: Cookie added without setHttpOnly(true)

patterns.message_template: addCookie called without setHttpOnly(true) in the same method
addCookie called without setHttpOnly(true) in the same method

description: A servlet Cookie is added to the response without a sibling setHttpOnly(true) call. HttpOnly-less cookies are accessible from document.cookie in JavaScript, expanding the impact of any XSS to session theft.
